name: Vegetarian Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pkg frozen spinach, thawed and drained
1/2 Box lasagne noodles, cooked and drained
1 lb (or close to it) pkg Ricotta cheese
Salt, pepper, onion powder, garlic powder
1 Large-ish jar prepared spaghetti sauce OR about 2 cups homemade
recipeInstructions:
From: Freddi Michael
This has pleased many meat eaters at my table. It's quite hearty.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan.
Beat eggs. Beat in Ricotta cheese until smooth. Stir in the Parmesan and spinach. Season with salt, pepper, onion powder and garlic powder.
In loaf pan, place a thin layer of tomato sauce. Layer 1/2 each
